title: myosotis albida
intro: Myosotis albida, also known as white forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Myosotis albida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other upper respiratory infections.
